subcodes.first_line: All have been created for the divine meeting, and unto each hath been allotted, and shall ever be, this most exalted station. Yet the veils of creation stand between grace and its outpouring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع از برای لقای الهی خلق شده اند و کل را از این مقام اعلی قسمت بوده و هست و لکن احتجابات خلق مابین فیض
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
